arts.ttl: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick's addresses Neymar return rumours as Brazilian sparkles at Santos
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick says that any possible negotiations involving a return to the club for Santos attacker Neymar are not his concern.

arts.ttl: Jorge Mendes makes statement on Lamine Yamal contract – ‘We only spoke about Lamine’
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal is arguably the most valuable asset the club has currently, but that status naturally comes with a wage rise for the 17-year-old. A significant one. arts.ttl: Agent Jorge Mendes publicly addresses exit for Barcelona star – ‘He needs to play now’
arts.sum: Barcelona forward Ansu Fati has had a tough few seasons, hampered by injuries and more recently, without the chance to play much. arts.ttl: Sensational Neymar to Barcelona transfer return NOT ruled out by boss Hansi Flick
arts.sum: The Brazilian superstar only recently re-signed with boyhood club Santos but is said to be pushing for a return to the Nou Camp

arts.ttl: Barca rule out Camp Nou return this season and may have to wait until 2026
arts.sum: The latest update on the situation claims that the earliest Barca will be able to play at their famous old ground once again is in October 2025. Barcelona are also said to be some way off being able to secure the requisite permits needed by the fire service to host football matches at the ground.
